code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut all = ""
  mut starts: List<Int> = []
  mut lens: List<Int> = []
  mut tok_start = -1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_of(input, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      if tok_start >= 0
        let tlen = i - tok_start
        let s_off = string.len(all)
        all = "#{all}#{string.substring(input, tok_start, i)}"
        starts = list.push(starts, s_off)
        lens = list.push(lens, tlen)
        tok_start = -1
      end
    else
      if tok_start < 0
        tok_start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if tok_start >= 0
    let tlen = n - tok_start
    let s_off = string.len(all)
    all = "#{all}#{string.substring(input, tok_start, n)}"
    starts = list.push(starts, s_off)
    lens = list.push(lens, tlen)
  end

  mut uniq_starts: List<Int> = []
  mut uniq_lens: List<Int> = []
  mut counts: List<Int> = []
  let t = starts.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < t
    let s_k = at(starts, k)
    let l_k = at(lens, k)
    mut found = -1
    mut j = 0
    let u = uniq_starts.len()
    while j < u and found < 0
      let s_j = at(uniq_starts, j)
      let l_j = at(uniq_lens, j)
      mut eq = l_j == l_k
      mut m = 0
      while eq and m < l_k
        let bk = byte_of(all, s_k + m)
        let bj = byte_of(all, s_j + m)
        if bk != bj
          eq = false
        end
        m = m + 1
      end
      if eq
        found = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if found < 0
      uniq_starts = list.push(uniq_starts, s_k)
      uniq_lens = list.push(uniq_lens, l_k)
      counts = list.push(counts, 1)
    else
      mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
      mut q = 0
      let cl = counts.len()
      while q < cl
        let cv = at(counts, q)
        if q == found
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, cv + 1)
        else
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, cv)
        end
        q = q + 1
      end
      counts = new_counts
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut best_idx = -1
  mut best_count = 0
  mut p = 0
  let uc = counts.len()
  while p < uc
    let c = at(counts, p)
    if c > best_count
      best_count = c
      best_idx = p
    end
    p = p + 1
  end

  if best_idx >= 0
    let s = at(uniq_starts, best_idx)
    let l = at(uniq_lens, best_idx)
    let tok = string.substring(all, s, s + l)
    print("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
  end
end
